title: Celestials S4
description: Modpack for the Celestials minecraft server!
body:
Adds a whole bunch of mods (particularly this server's unique mod) needed to play on the Celestials server. Fairly light content-wise, since most of my additons are done via resource pack / data pack.

This pack doesn't contain any of the purely server-side mods (nor the aforementioned resource- or datapacks), which means you won't get the full experience outside the server.

![Celestials Season 4 Part 2 thumbnail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6ef6c7242f88fa79ff73034287e42700a31818e.png)
